use_cases: Primary navigation for SaaS dashboards and admin interfaces
Hierarchical menu system for project management applications
Collapsible sidebar for content management systems
User settings and account navigation panel
ai_summary: A comprehensive sidebar navigation component featuring expandable menu sections, search functionality, and multiple icon-supported navigation categories including dashboard, tasks, folders, calendar, analytics, and settings. Built with Carbon icons and inline SVGs for a clean, professional dashboard interface with click-to-reveal accordion behavior and hover state interactions.
